title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 14 June 2024

summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 14/06/2024
In the ship recycling sector, different regions are grappling with their unique market conditions. India is currently in a downturn with reduced demand for ship steel scrap
Source: Best Oasis Limited
